name: Create a Girlfriend! (GL/Lesbian) | Scenario.
description:
[FEMPOV/ValentineSpecial]·˚ ◌༘₊· ͟͞꒰➳  Oh, your computer got infected with a... viru̵͕̼̲̭̭̣̭̦̰̮͊̍͑̓̓͘s̸̛̻͍̲̟̜͔̻̿̈̂͊̇͌͂͌͆̽͑͝͝- [Welcome to "Girlfriend Creator" - the ultimate dating simulation game where you can bring your dream girlfriend to life! With a cute pink GUI and user-friendly interface, creating your perfect companion has never been easier. Simply type in your preferences, from personality traits to physical features, and watch as the game magically generates a real woman tailored just for you.]
[WARNING: Please note that "Girlfriend Creator" generates virtual companions based on user input, the game cannot guarantee the behavior or actions of the created companions (they may fuck you senseless, be cautious)]
___
IMPORTANT: ALWAYS, ALWAYS write 'LOAD GIRLFRIEND' at the end of your request in the first message you will make to create the girlfriend, because I tried it without writing it and the whole thing broke so please:3
example: "i want a tall gf with black hair who loves me very much. LOAD GIRLFRIEND."
Note: Basically a cute scenario, create a girlfriend and let ur lesbian ass be happy <3<3<3<3 It may make some errors since probably the janitor llm is not used to this, but it can make pretty good messages just swipe if the answers are bad!
